meta.name: Masters Vote
meta.description: 4位投资大师(Graham/Buffett/Druckenmiller/Burry)各自独立分析，多数票决定买卖。缺数据时弃权而非猜测。
meta.description_en: 4 legendary investors (Graham/Buffett/Druckenmiller/Burry) each analyze independently, majority vote decides. Missing data → abstain, not guess.
meta.methodology: Each master receives enriched data (price, technicals, fundamentals with industry benchmarks, news sentiment) and responds with their investment thesis. Graham/Buffett: value metrics — P/E, D/E, margin of safety, Graham Number. Cathie Wood: innovation/disruption potential, TAM expansion, S-curve positioning. Druckenmiller: macro regime, momentum, institutional flows, risk/reward asymmetry. Burry: contrarian deep value, short interest, hidden catalysts.
meta.methodology_cn: 每位大师接收丰富数据（价格、技术面、基本面含行业基准、新闻情绪）。Graham/Buffett：价值指标 — P/E、D/E、安全边际、Graham Number。Cathie Wood：创新/颠覆潜力、TAM扩张、S-curve定位。Druckenmiller：宏观regime、动量、机构资金流、风险/回报不对称。Burry：逆向深度价值、空头利率、隐藏催化剂。
meta.ai_mode: live/paper: Claude Opus 4 | backtest: Claude Haiku | fallback: rule-based scoring

meta.name: Investment Committee
meta.description: 模拟机构投委会流程：市场评估→基本面→技术面→风险→备忘录。VIX感知，有历史备忘录记忆。
meta.description_en: Simulates institutional IC process: Market Assessment → Fundamentals → Technicals → Risk → Memo. VIX-aware with historical memo memory.
meta.methodology: Round 1 (Research Analyst): Deep fundamental analysis with Porter's Five Forces, technical pattern recognition, industry comparison vs sector benchmarks. Round 2 (Risk Manager): Identifies red flags, calculates position sizing via Kelly Criterion, evaluates downside scenarios. Round 3 (Portfolio Manager): Weighs analyst optimism vs risk concerns, considers portfolio concentration and correlation, makes final signal with conviction level. VIX regime detection adjusts overall risk tolerance.
meta.methodology_cn: 第1轮（Research Analyst）：深度基本面分析 + Porter五力模型 + 技术形态识别 + 行业对比。第2轮（Risk Manager）：红旗检测 + Kelly Criterion仓位计算 + 下行情景评估。第3轮（Portfolio Manager）：综合分析师乐观 vs 风控担忧 + 组合集中度和相关性 + 最终信号和信心水平。VIX regime 检测调整整体风险容忍度。
meta.ai_mode: live/paper: Claude Opus 4 | backtest: Claude Haiku | fallback: weighted scoring

meta.name: Quant Model
meta.description: 纯数学量化模型。根据VIX恐慌指数自动切换市场regime，调整四维权重：趋势/均值回归/动量/波动率。
meta.description_en: Pure mathematical model. Auto-switches market regime based on VIX, adapts weights across 4 dimensions: Trend/Mean Reversion/Momentum/Volatility.
meta.methodology: Four scoring dimensions with regime-dependent weights: (1) Trend: MA20/50/200 crossovers and relative position. (2) Mean Reversion: Bollinger Band position + RSI extremes (oversold < 30, overbought > 70). (3) Momentum: 5-day price change rate + volume surge detection. (4) Volatility: VIX regime awareness. Bull regime → heavier trend/momentum weights. Bear regime → heavier mean-reversion weights. Signal threshold: ±15 from neutral. Max confidence ~63%.
meta.methodology_cn: 四维评分（权重随regime变化）：(1) 趋势：MA20/50/200交叉和相对位置。(2) 均值回归：布林带位置 + RSI极值（超卖<30, 超买>70）。(3) 动量：5日涨跌幅 + 成交量突增检测。(4) 波动率：VIX regime感知。牛市 → 趋势/动量权重大。熊市 → 均值回归权重大。信号阈值：中性±15。最大信心度~63%。
meta.ai_mode: Pure rules — no LLM, no API cost

meta.name: LLM Debate
meta.description: AI辩论引擎(Claude Opus 4.6)。Bull/Bear两个AI对辩，Judge综合裁决。每天从500只中选50只深度分析，结合新闻情绪+历史记忆。
meta.description_en: AI debate engine (Claude Opus 4.6). Bull/Bear agents debate, Judge decides. Selects top 50 from 500 for deep analysis daily, with news sentiment + historical memory.
meta.methodology: Step 1 (Bull Agent): Builds the strongest possible bullish case — growth catalysts, positive technicals, favorable macro. Step 2 (Bear Agent): Sees Bull's argument and constructs strongest bearish counter — overvaluation risks, negative trends, macro headwinds. Step 3 (Judge): Reviews both arguments, applies Bayesian reasoning to weigh evidence strength, calculates posterior probability, renders final signal with calibrated confidence. News sentiment from rule-based analysis feeds into all three agents' context.
meta.methodology_cn: 第1步（Bull Agent）：构建最强做多论据 — 增长催化剂、正面技术信号、有利宏观。第2步（Bear Agent）：看到多方论据后构建最强做空反驳 — 估值过高风险、负面趋势、宏观逆风。第3步（Judge）：审阅双方论据，用 Bayesian reasoning 评估证据强度，计算后验概率，给出校准后的信心度和最终信号。新闻情绪（规则分析）输入三个 agent 的 context。
meta.ai_mode: live/paper: Claude Opus 4 | backtest: Claude Haiku | fallback: weighted scoring

meta.name: Baseline
meta.description: 最简单的策略：均线金叉/死叉 + RSI超买超卖。作为对照组——如果复杂策略赢不了这个，复杂就没价值。
meta.description_en: Simplest strategy: MA Golden/Death Cross + RSI. Control group — if complex strategies can't beat this, complexity has no value.
meta.methodology: Golden Cross (MA50 > MA200) = bullish signal. Death Cross (MA50 < MA200) = bearish signal. RSI tiers adjust confidence: RSI < 30 → high bullish confidence boost, RSI 30-40 → moderate boost, RSI 60-70 → moderate bearish, RSI > 70 → high bearish confidence. No fundamentals, no news, no sector analysis, no AI. Pure price + volume.
meta.methodology_cn: 金叉（MA50 > MA200）= 看多信号。死叉（MA50 < MA200）= 看空信号。RSI 分级调整信心度：RSI < 30 → 高看多加成，RSI 30-40 → 中等加成，RSI 60-70 → 中等看空，RSI > 70 → 高看空加成。不看基本面，不看新闻，不看行业，不用 AI。纯价格 + 成交量。
meta.ai_mode: Pure rules — no LLM, no API cost
